subcodes.first_line: O friend! It is a long time since any news hath been received from thee. Although, earlier, a letter arrived in which thou hadst asked a question
subcodes.first_line_orig: شما بايد هوشيار باشيد و نفوس را از نفثات  خفيّه و همسات  سرّيّه محافظه نمائيد و ثابت بر ميثاق به نصّ صريح الهی
subcodes.subjects: @Christ; Christianity, @symbolism, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @firmness in the Covenant, @unity; oneness of humanity
